## Generated-data risk

Confirm no generated CM1 output, NetCDF files, local run folders, LANDUSE.TBL, CM1 binaries, CM1 source, local runtime files, or large processed visualization artifacts will be committed.

## CM1 source-of-truth risk

Explain how the scenario distinguishes preview estimates, generated CM1 configuration, running/completed CM1 results, and visualization interpretation.
